summary: Comprehensive testing of Frameflow auth routing, session persistence, and all pages. All 17 tests passed. Super admin redirects to /admin, client_user redirects to /dashboard, JWT stored in localStorage, session persists after refresh. All client pages (Dashboard, Analytics, Scheduler, Content Library, Campaigns, Settings) load without crash. Admin panel and billing working. WhatsApp float button present on all pages.
critical_code_review_comments: Auth routing correctly implemented - super_admin to /admin, client_user to /dashboard
JWT stored in localStorage with key 'frameflow_token' for session persistence
All client pages handle null data gracefully without crashing
WhatsApp float button present on all pages (wa.me/919330408074)
No signup functionality - login only as designed
Privacy Policy and Data Deletion pages accessible without auth
seed_data_creation: Using existing test clients from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: All critical bugs fixed. Auth routing working correctly. Session persistence via JWT in localStorage confirmed. All pages loading without crash. WhatsApp float button on all pages.

mocked_apis.Meta_OAuth: Backend ready but requires META_APP_ID and META_APP_SECRET env vars
